'''Diado''' was a [[Water/Legends|snow]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was the location of a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[CIS Weapons Factory|weapons factory]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] [[Mission to Diado|went to]] this world to steal a [[CIS-Advanced starfighter]] being developed there. He was aided by one of the planet's inhabitants, the thief [[Na-Jia]].<ref name="It Takes a Thief" />

At the end of the war, Diado was still under [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist]] control. The planet was eventually [[Battle of Diado|attacked]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] by the [[Twelfth Army/Legends|12th Imperial Sector Army]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
